title: Consistent snapshot cursor pagination under mutation

difficulty.rationale: Requires snapshot isolation over a mutable sort key, stable opaque cursors bound to snapshot id, and correct behavior when items move or are deleted mid-pagination.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: GET /items returns snapshot, items, and next_cursor.
Pages within a snapshot do not overlap item ids.
must_not: Duplicate an item across pages when its live updated_at moves forward.
Include post-snapshot inserts in the same snapshot pages.
Crash when a cursor anchor item is deleted live.
edge_cases: Cursors from a different snapshot are rejected.
PATCH bumps updated_at without affecting an open snapshot page sequence.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
